title: Deadly Weather
description: Makes most weather conditions try to kill you
body:
# Deadly Weather

The sun burns you, spending time in the snow makes you freeze to death, thunderstorms throw lots of lightning at you and rain is like acid. Better stay inside.

This mod was somewhat inspired by a youtube video I've seen over a decade ago where two guys played with a plugin called Solar Apocalypse.

# Config

Basically everything can be switched off in the config. Additionally, you can use commands to change the settings for each world independently.
